expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: No '## Preflight:' section. Response provides a detailed HCI_ValidateAndSendDataPkt implementation plan based on reading the actual source file, but with no structured preflight block.

No preflight arithmetic check. The response does note the existing 0xFF00 guard in HCI_SendDataPkt and the maxNumConns upper bound, but this is in the plan body, not a structured preflight arithmetic section.

suggestions.reason: The without_skill response was actually quite good — it read the real source and found the existing handle validation. Consider whether the assertion should also check that the arithmetic check covers the specific signed/unsigned promotion hazard, not just any range check.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are discriminating on the presence of structured preflight.
